predictions.source_quote: 10-year Treasury yields will end 2023 at 3.5% vs. a 14-year high of 4.22% in October 2022.
S&P 500 will tread water, ending 2023 around 3,900, but with material swings along the way.
Oil will outperform gold and copper, with Brent crude, the global oil benchmark, ending 2023 at $110.
U.S. dollar will peak in 2022 and decline through 2023.
Japanese stocks, meanwhile, could benefit from a combination of low valuations and idiosyncratic tailwinds - translating to 11% gains for the Tokyo Stock Price Index next year.

predictions.variable: MSCI Emerging Markets Index price return
predictions.source_quote: The MSCI EM, an index of mid and large-cap companies in 24 emerging markets, could see 12% price returns in 2023.
European equities could offer a modest upside, with a forecasted 6.3% total return over 2023
